title: salix × tephrocarpa
intro: Salix × tephrocarpa, also known as Tephrocarpa or Salix × purpurea 'Tephrocarpa', is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix purpurea and Salix alba. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Salix × tephrocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain and swelling, and its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Salix × tephrocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
